name: Patten-Strickland Sch Bus Svc
fmcsa_status: Active (USDOT); Not authorized for interstate for-hire
officers: James Patten Sr. (VP/Director); Judith S. Patten (Secretary/Treasurer/Director); James Richard Patten (Founder/President)
entity_status: INACTIVE (administrative dissolution for failure to file annual report, effective 09/22/2017)
notes: Input name 'Patten-Strickland Sch Bus Svc' at 2056 Featherwood Dr W, Jacksonville, FL 32233 does not exist as a distinct FMCSA carrier (SAFER *STRICKLAND* search in FL returned only STRICKLAND DUMPING SERVICE and STRICKLAND SUPPLIES INC; *PATTEN-STRICKLAND* returned zero). The Featherwood Dr W address is currently published as the operating address of PATTEN SCHOOL BUS COMPANY (pattentransportation.weebly.com), which corresponds to PATTEN SCHOOL BUS SERVICE INC (USDOT 1361048, Sunbiz doc S53652). Most likely the 'Strickland' name was either (a) a co-marketing/marketing keyword used on the Patten website, or (b) a historic dba/partner. The Sunbiz FL corporate filing 'PATTEN SCHOOL BUS SERVICE, INC.' filed 5/20/1991 was administratively dissolved 9/22/2017; the underlying FMCSA carrier is still listed as active and the operator continues to publicize service (~12 buses on its own site, 8 power units per current FMCSA MCS-150). Founded 1972 per company website. Match confidence medium because the legal entity name differs from the input ('Patten-Strickland' vs 'Patten School Bus Service').
